meaning: 斯利那加[南亚克什米尔西部城市](为印控克什米尔地区首府)
examples: The army is now on patrol in Srinagar and a curfew has been imposed.
It was the first big militant attack in Srinagar in two years.
On most days, Srinagar is a ghost town of shuttered shops and empty streets.
He was arrested in Qazigund, a town just under 75km (45 miles) south of Srinagar.
One of those affected is Aejaz Hussain, a Srinagar businessman who regularly travels to China.
